lines.speaker: Cuali, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Nilsal, my child. Welcome to this holy temple of Ralos.

lines.speaker: Cuali, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: If there is anything I can do for you, please just let me know.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you heal me? I'm injured.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is it you do here?

lines.speaker: Cuali, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: I am one of the seven teoki in service to Ralos.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Seven? That's quite a specific number.

lines.speaker: Cuali, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Indeed. Along with our counterparts from the Sect of Ranul, each of us is responsible for one of seven key holy sites across the region.

lines.speaker: Cuali, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: As you have likely guessed, my duty is to maintain the temple here in Fortis.

lines.speaker: Cuali, Teoki of Ralos
lines.text: Timoiva, and may the sun light your way.
